notes: Named as colonel of the Sixth Gharagozloo Regiment.
Named as colonel of the Mansur Regiment.
Named as colonel/commander of the Mokhberan Regiment.
Fadavi Regiment was attached to Mostafa Qoli Khan Mirpanj.
Commanded two Mokhberan regiments during the Kerman mission.
Commanded the Zanganeh Regiment for a period.
Received command of the Malayer regiment.
Received command of the Tuyserkan regiment.
After serving as colonel during his father's lifetime, Abdollah Khan later commanded the Fadavi Regiment.
Succeeded Abdollah Khan in command of the Fadavi Regiment.
Command succession began with Mahmud Khan Naser al-Molk.
Succeeded Mahmud Khan in command of the Mokhberan Regiment.
Succeeded Ahmad Khan after promotion to Sartip.
Served as colonel of the Mokhberan Regiment.
